extracted_information.overview: This guide provides a step-by-step process to add an age verification pop-up, specifically for Squarespace websites, but the core HTML, CSS, and JavaScript code snippets are standard and applicable to any general website.

implementation_guide.title: Access Squarespace’s Code Injection
implementation_guide.description: Log in to your Squarespace account, navigate to your website, and click on “Settings.” Under the “Advanced” tab, find “Code Injection.”

implementation_guide.title: Add Custom HTML for the Pop-up
implementation_guide.description: Add the provided HTML code to the “Header” section of the “Code Injection.” This code creates the basic structure of the pop-up.
implementation_guide.code_purpose: Creates a basic pop-up with a title, message, and verification button.

implementation_guide.title: Add Custom CSS for Styling
implementation_guide.description: Add the provided CSS code to the “Header” section of the “Code Injection.” This code defines the visual appearance of the pop-up and button.
implementation_guide.code_purpose: Defines the appearance of the pop-up and the verification button.

implementation_guide.title: Add JavaScript for Pop-up Behavior
implementation_guide.description: Add the provided JavaScript code to the “Footer” section of the “Code Injection.” This code controls the display and logic of the pop-up.
implementation_guide.code_purpose: Controls the display and verification logic of the pop-up.

implementation_guide.title: Test and Adjust
implementation_guide.description: Save changes, preview your Squarespace website, and test the pop-up to ensure correct functionality and compliance. Make necessary adjustments to the code.

extracted_information.html_snippet:
html

Age Verification

Please confirm that you are of legal age to enter this website.
extracted_information.general_applicability_note: The provided HTML, CSS, and JavaScript code snippets are standard web technologies. They can be applied to any website by embedding the HTML within the body, the CSS within a `<style>` tag in the `<head>` or a linked stylesheet, and the JavaScript within a `<script>` tag (preferably at the end of the `<body>` or in the `<head>` with `defer`). The Squarespace-specific instructions pertain only to where these codes are injected within the Squarespace platform.

features: Verification button to dismiss the pop-up.
Overlay background to darken the page behind the pop-up.
CSS for styling pop-up position, background, content, and button.
JavaScript for handling pop-up display and button click events.
Placeholder for implementing age verification logic (e.g., setting a cookie to remember user verification).
